name: motion-animated-background
title: Animated Background
author: Motion Primitives
description: Moves a shared background between selected or hovered child elements.

changes: Changed the cn import from @/lib/utils to ../../lib/utils for source-batch and install-target portability.
Added a useReducedMotion branch that removes the shared layout id and snaps opacity changes.
Added focus, blur, and click parity to hover mode so keyboard and touch users can set the same active state.

modifications.change: Changed the local utility import, added a reduced-motion snap, and added keyboard/touch parity to hover mode.
modifications.reason: Resolve the copied helper without a consumer root alias and keep the selection behavior usable without hover or animated layout movement.
